title: Skill Testing, Safety, Versioning, and Maintenance · Threat Case: Instruction Tests
summary: Build a regression suite for a skill and its helper scripts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext instruction tests increment in a skill test and release harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.

Provide templates and assets that prevent inconsistent recreation.
